requests.name: OWNER ACTIVE + stripe_customer_id → portal session created
requests.docs:
PRE-REQUISITE: Signed in as OWNER. Company must have subscription_status=ACTIVE and a stripe_customer_id set (happens automatically after completing Stripe checkout).

Expect 201 + { url: 'https://billing.stripe.com/...' }.
Open that URL in a browser — it shows the Stripe Customer Portal where the user can cancel, update payment method, and view invoices.

requests.name: ENGINEER → 403
requests.docs:
PRE-REQUISITE: Signed in as ENGINEER.
RolesGuard must reject with 403. Engineers cannot open the billing portal.

requests.name: OWNER with no stripe_customer_id → 400

tests.value: No Stripe customer found for this company.

requests.name: Unauthenticated → 401
requests.docs: No session cookie. SessionGuard rejects before the controller is reached.

requests.name: Portal return_url points to /dashboard/settings
requests.docs:
After creating the portal session, open the returned URL in a browser and log into the Stripe portal.
Then click 'Return to Vantro' (or equivalent) — you should land at /dashboard/settings.

Note: FRONTEND_URL in api/.env must be set correctly. Locally: http://localhost:3001
